labels.edge_betweenness: M5 teacher score; higher means more central edge.
labels.edge_betweenness_rank_pct: 0 is top-ranked by M5 within the graph.
labels.gcc_delta: One-step GCC-ratio drop after removing this edge.
labels.gcc_delta_rank_pct: 0 is top-ranked by one-step GCC damage within the graph.

note: Use only split=train/val/synthetic_test for model development; keep real_external_test as external benchmark.
